scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-medium leading-tight

navbar.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-black/5
navbar.instructions: Logo placeholder on the left, anchor links (Experience, Services, Projects) on the right, and 'Get a Quote' button.

hero.style: relative min-h-[90vh] flex items-center justify-center text-center
hero.content: relative z-20 max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 flex flex-col items-center
hero.heading: Commercial-Grade Precision. Residential Care.
hero.subheading: Over a decade of enterprise high-rise experience.
hero.instructions: Dark architectural background image. Large bold headline.

buttons.primary: bg-accent hover:bg-accent_hover text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-none font-medium transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-text_primary hover:bg-accent text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-none font-medium transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: border border-text_primary text-text_primary hover:bg-accent hover:border-accent hover:text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-none font-medium transition-all duration-300

cards.style: bg-surface border border-border rounded-none transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 duration-300
cards.instructions: Use for the Services section. 3-column minimalist layout.

forms.input: w-full border-b border-border bg-transparent py-4 text-text_primary focus:border-accent focus:outline-none transition-colors rounded-none placeholder:text-text_muted
forms.instructions: Minimalist contact form, fields for Name, Email, Phone, Project Details. POSTs to /api/contact.

hero_background.description: Modern home exterior at night with architectural lighting.

experience.title: Our Roots
experience.content: Founder background as Superintendent for Menkes, Solmar, Tribute Communities.
experience.metrics: Multi-million dollar budgets, timeline management, site logistics.

motion.hover: Subtle transitions on buttons and cards (duration-300).
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for grid items and sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML tags (div, section) for layouts to ensure custom styling is applied accurately. Do NOT use generic Shadcn layout components if they conflict with the custom CSS rules.
Adhere STRICTLY to the defined color palette: Crisp white, deep charcoal text, and burnt orange only for primary accents/buttons.
Implement 'data-testid' on all interactive and key informational elements (buttons, links, form inputs).
Ensure 'Inter' is used for body text and 'Outfit' (or a similar modern geometric sans) for headings. Configure Tailwind to use these.
Build the contact form to submit data via a POST request to '/api/contact'.
Maintain generous spacing (py-24 or py-32) between sections for the 'airy' high-end feel.
Do not introduce extra colors into the palette.
